_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: The 79.2% bottom analog and stablecoin growth support a move toward Hope, but elevated ETF flows and the analyst's poor directional track record warrant low conviction on timing.
next_move.brains_agree: Both agree on UP direction toward Hope, but split on conviction — narrative is confident, analyst is cautious and explicitly humble about direction calls
next_move.confirmed_if: Fear & Greed rises above 30 with BTC momentum sustaining above 55 and funding cooling below 45
next_move.invalidated_if: Fear & Greed drops below 20, VIX spikes above 75, or BTC momentum falls below 40 with funding rising above 60
